title: A High-Level Taxonomy of Deep Learning Applications
description: A flowchart categorizing major application domains of deep learning, illustrating how core deep learning architectures are applied to solve real-world problems.
elements: Input Data Types (e.g., Images, Text, Sensor Data)
Core Deep Learning Architectures (e.g., CNN, RNN, Transformer)
Application Domains (e.g., Computer Vision, NLP, Robotics)
relationships: Different input data types are processed by specialized core architectures, which power various application domains to perform specific output tasks.
